prestazioni: Engine: Quad-Turbocharged 8.0L W16 (Engine Code: **QC01**) with upgraded **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbos (custom billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducer, 106mm exducer) paired with **Turbosmart Race Port BOV** (dual-stage, 2.5" outlet) and **Pectel SQ6M ECU** (full flex-fuel mapping, 32-bit processing, 1200hp+ target on E85)

Exhaust: **Capristo 102mm Titanium Valved Exhaust System** (dual-mode bypass, Inconel 625 headers, 3D-printed merge collectors) with **Hermès-branded 24K gold-plated exhaust tips** (laser-engraved "H" insignia, thermal-reactive enamel finish)

Suspension: **KW Suspensions V5 Coilovers (Chiron-specific)** with **Hermès Tan leather-wrapped springs** (custom-wound, 1800lb/in front, 2200lb/in rear), **Bilstein CDC dampers** (adaptive valving, 0.1ms response time), and **Eibach Pro-Street S anti-roll bars** (32mm front, 28mm rear, hollow-core chromoly)
estetica: Body: **Rocket Bunny V3 Widebody Kit (Chiron-specific)** with **Hermès Barenia leather-wrapped carbon fiber** (hand-stitched, contrast topstitching, 3M Scotchgard hydrophobic coating) and **Vorsteiner VFF-1070 front splitter** (adjustable dive planes, titanium mounting hardware)

Interior: **Hermès x Bugatti "Haut à Courroies" Interior Package** (full **Hermès Tadelakt leather** dashboard/door cards, **Patek Philippe analog chronograph** integrated into center console, **Baccarat crystal gear selector** with Hermès saddle stitching)

Wheels: **BBS FI-R II (20" front, 21" rear)** with **Hermès "H" center caps** (18K gold, enamel-filled engraving) and **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (custom compound, 305/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear, nitrogen-filled with Hermès-branded valve stems)
